questionHtml: Label the parts of the DNA diagram indicated by I, II, III and IV.
markschemeHtml:
a. I. cytosine 

b. II. sugar-phosphate/covalent/phosphodiester bond 

c. III. phosphate 

d. IV. deoxyribose

Award [1] for any two correct responses.

meta.title: Label the parts of the DNA diagram indicated by I, II, III and IV.
